final:
module mux4to1 (
    input wire [3:0] obf_in, // 4 input signals
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2 selection lines
    output wire out // output signal
);
    assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? obf_in[0] :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? obf_in[1] :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? obf_in[2] :
                 (sel == 2'b11) ? obf_in[3] : 1'b0; // default case
endmodule
